claim: Temporal knowledge graphs track historical changes to facts, enabling agents to understand why information changed and which facts are currently valid
actionable: Use Graphiti or similar temporal knowledge graphs to maintain both current and historical fact versions with validity timestamps, improving agent reasoning about dynamic data
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Knowledge graphs represent relationships between entities, allowing agents to search context around specific nodes rather than just keywords
actionable: Implement center-node searches in knowledge graphs to refine results: identify a key entity (e.g., Claude 4) then search nearby nodes for related facts
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Graphiti is optimized for dynamic data with subsecond query latency, unlike GraphRAG/LightRAG which are better for static document summarization
actionable: Choose Graphiti for real-time RAG with frequently updated data and LightRAG for static documentation; combine both in agentic RAG for flexibility
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Episodes in Graphiti can be strings, JSON objects, or other formats without rigid schema requirements, allowing flexible knowledge representation
actionable: Use JSON episodes in Graphiti when representing structured information with key-value pairs, letting the LLM infer relationships automatically
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Graphiti automatically constructs relationships between entities based on LLM interpretation of episode content and metadata
actionable: Structure episode content with context hints (e.g., 'GPT-3.5 was the previous version of GPT-4') to help Graphiti infer accurate relationships
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Agentic RAG combines multiple search strategies (knowledge graphs + vector databases) to provide agents flexibility in knowledge retrieval
actionable: Build agents with dual tools: one for knowledge graph searches (relationships) and one for vector database searches (semantic similarity), letting agents choose the best approach
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs

claim: Knowledge graphs with temporal data enable agents to provide nuanced answers with historical context (e.g., 'X was best, now Y is, but Z emerged recently')
actionable: Structure agent responses to include validity timestamps and invalidated-at timestamps from knowledge graph results, providing temporal context automatically
source_title: Make RAG 100x Better with Real-Time Knowledge Graphs
